admin.welcomeSubtitle: Smart Tourism Observatory — Rio Grande do Norte

planner.title: DunasTech AI Router
planner.heading: Plan Your Route
planner.description: Discover optimized itineraries in Rio Grande do Norte based on your profile, available time, and mode of transportation.
planner.walkingWarning: The distance is {distance} km, which is too long to walk. Consider renting a buggy or hiring a certified shuttle.
planner.localRoute: Local itinerary. Does not require road travel between destinations today.
planner.noAttractions: No specific attractions listed. Enjoy exploring the place freely!
planner.rateAndAudit: Submit your satisfaction rating and compliance audit.
planner.recommendedSubtitle: Ranked by attraction health and compliance of descriptions

adventure.label: Adventure & Dunes 🏄‍♂️
adventure.desc: For those seeking adrenaline, buggy rides, and shifting dunes.

relax.label: Relax & Nature 🐚
relax.desc: Deserted beaches, natural pools, and calm freshwater lagoons.

culture.label: History & Culture 🏰
culture.desc: Colonial forts, historic mansions, and craft centers.

gastronomy.label: Gastronomy 🦐
gastronomy.desc: Seafood restaurants, hinterland cuisine, and regional drinks.

1day.label: 1 Day (Day trip) 📅
1day.description: Exploration of the destination's main tourist attractions in a day trip.

weekend.label: Weekend 🌅
weekend.day1: Arrival, check-in with a certified partner, and initial visit to the main landmark.
weekend.day2: Day of guided adventure and return in the late afternoon with a spectacular sunset.

1week.label: 1 Week or more backpacking 🎒
1week.day1: Acclimatization day, short walks, and relaxation nearby.
1week.day2: Day reserved for eco-sports and guided snorkeling.
1week.day3: Cultural tour and shopping for certified crafts in the historic center.

hike.title: Genipabu & Pitangui Ecological Trail
hike.description: An adventure-filled walk crossing the famous Genipabu dunes to reach the Pitangui lagoon.

buggy.title: North Coast Thrilling Buggy Tour
buggy.description: Classic buggy tour through the shifting dunes of Genipabu, Pitangui lagoon, and snorkeling in the reef pools.

shuttle.title: North & South Coast Adventure Route
shuttle.description: Complete shuttle/van route connecting the famous Ponta Negra, Genipabu dunes, and Pipa cliffs.

hike.title: Cliffs & Madeiro Beach Trail
hike.description: Relaxing seaside walk from Pipa to Madeiro Beach with a high chance of spotting dolphins.

buggy.title: Calm Dunes & North Coast Route
buggy.description: Relaxing buggy tour passing through the natural pools of Maracajaú and the charming São Miguel do Gostoso.

shuttle.title: Calm Waters & Isolated Peninsula Route
shuttle.description: Perfect for relaxing in the Maracajaú pools, Galinhos lagoon, and the calm beaches of São Miguel do Gostoso.

hike.title: Historic Walk from Morro to Barreira
hike.description: Explore Ponta Negra beach on foot and walk to the historic Barreira do Inferno launch center.

buggy.title: Historic Route & North Coast Buggy
buggy.description: Discover the history of the Reis Magos Fort and adventure through the Genipabu dunes by buggy.

shuttle.title: Grand Historic & Archaeological Route
shuttle.description: Shuttle/van trip exploring the colonial Fort in Natal, the Historic City of Mossoró, and the Soledade archaeological site.

hike.title: Gastronomic Walk from Pipa to Madeiro
hike.description: Walk along the beach savoring regional snacks, tropical drinks, and the best of Pipa's cuisine.

buggy.title: South Coast Gastronomic Buggy Tour
buggy.description: Taste the best crabs and seafood between the cliffs of Pipa and Barra de Cunhaú.

shuttle.title: Potiguar Flavors South Coast Circuit
shuttle.description: Enjoy the rich beach cuisine of Ponta Negra, Pipa, and the gastronomic mangroves of Cunhaú.

planner.planTripDesc: Choose experiences and insert the required details to generate your complete travel dossier.
planner.specialReqsPlaceholder: e.g., Accessibility needs, dietary restrictions, etc.
planner.sustainabilityText: This trip respects local visitor limits and exclusively features local partners certified by Cadastur, promoting safe and sustainable tourism in RN.
